title: 'Never seen anything like it': Iran damaged 16 US military sites across 8 Gulf nations
content: Iran and its allies have reportedly damaged sixteen United States military sites across eight Middle Eastern nations. CNN reports, citing satellite images and official interviews, reveal significant degradation of radar, communications, and aircraft facilities. This conflict has already cost the US billions. Gulf allies expressed concerns about the alliance's resilience.

title: SC knock, repolling, TMC vs BJP fight gets ugly: West Bengal on edge before counting day
content: West Bengal is on high alert before counting day due to Supreme Court moves, a 15-seat repoll order, and EVM tampering allegations. The TMC has challenged a high court order, while the Election Commission assures security at strongrooms amidst post-poll violence and transport disruptions.

title: 'Do not use Anthropic AI models': Goldman Sachs tells employees in Hong Kong
content: Goldman Sachs has prohibited its Hong Kong bankers from using Anthropic's Claude AI models, citing contract interpretations amid US-China tech tensions. This move, impacting coding and financial modeling, raises concerns for Hong Kong's financial hub status and other institutions using the AI. The restriction highlights broader worries about AI intellectual property theft and cybersecurity risks.

title: IPL: KL Rahul goes past Virat Kohli with record knock vs Rajasthan Royals
content: KL Rahul has set a new IPL record with the most 50-plus scores against Rajasthan Royals. He now shares the top spot with AB de Villiers. Rahul's performance came during a chase where he partnered with Pathum Nissanka. Earlier, Riyan Parag's strong batting propelled Rajasthan Royals to a high total. Rahul's consistent scoring against RR marks another milestone.

title: Why is MS Dhoni missing from CSK dugout? Hussey reveals selfless call
content: MS Dhoni's absence from the CSK dugout in IPL 2026 is a selfless act, according to batting coach Michael Hussey. Dhoni chose to stay away to prevent being a distraction, allowing the team to focus on their game. He remains involved behind the scenes and is progressing well from his calf injury, with a potential return soon.

title: CEO says ‘When Google CEO agrees with Elon, everyone must pay attention’; Musk responds
content: Elon Musk agreed with a post highlighting Google CEO Sundar Pichai's vision of space-based data centers becoming "the new normal" within a decade. This aligns with Musk's own long-held views on utilizing space for large-scale infrastructure. Pichai previously mentioned Google's "moon shot" to place data centers in orbit to harness solar energy, with a first step planned for 2027.

title: From red to green to saffron? BJP eyes power shift in Bengal as Mamata defends her turf
content: West Bengal's political landscape, historically dominated by single parties for extended periods, is now witnessing an intense battle for the 2026 assembly elections. Chief minister Mamata Banerjee's 15-year rule faces a formidable challenge from the aggressively expanding BJP, which aims to end the TMC's reign. This election marks a critical juncture for the state's political legacy.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' BO day 44 [LIVE]: Ranveer Singh film misses breaching global record of 'Baahubali 2' by Rs 3 crore
content: ‘Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge’ is rewriting the record books as it nears the end of its seventh week. Having already become the first Hindi film to join the Rs. 1,000 crore net club in India, the film’s total domestic net now stands at a staggering Rs. 1,135.25 crore. On Day 44 of its theatrical run, live tracking shows the film maintaining a steady grip on the audience despite a reduced screen count. With a current worldwide gross of Rs. 1,783.90 crore, the Ranveer Singh-starrer is just steps away from overtaking the lifetime global collections of Baahubali 2.

title: Apple CEO Tim Cook may have hinted at iPhone price hike, here's what he said
content: Apple's CEO, Tim Cook, has indicated that rising computer memory costs are increasingly impacting the company's finances. While Apple absorbed initial increases, significantly higher expenses are expected from the June quarter onwards. This situation, coupled with supply chain issues for advanced processors affecting Macs, suggests potential price hikes for consumers as Apple explores various options.

title: Waking up with a dry mouth every day? Doctors say it’s not just dehydration
content: Waking up with a dry mouth daily often signals more than just dehydration. Experts highlight that mouth breathing due to nasal congestion, sleep apnea, certain medications, or underlying health conditions like diabetes can cause persistent morning dryness. Ignoring this symptom can lead to dental issues and other health complications.

title: SC to hear TMC plea demanding state staff be part of vote counting supervisor duty
content: The high court also said while dismissing the petition, “It is the prerogative of the office of the Election Commission of India to appoint the counting supervisor and counting assistant either from the state government or the central government. This court does not find any illegality for appointing counting supervisor and counting assistant from the central government / central PSU employee instead of state government employee.”

title: Mike Vrabel split response vs Cardi B-Offset breakup styles clash
content: Grammy winning rapper Cardi B and Jen Vrabel, wife of New England Patriots head coach Mike Vrabel, show different ways of handling cheating. Cardi B forgave her ex-husband but warned of consequences. She is no longer with him. She filed for a divorce in July 2024 after seven years of marriage. As for Jen Vrabel, she was seen with her husband Mike Vrabel after reports of infidelity with Dianna Russini did internet rounds. Their actions suggest personal choices in their respective relationships.

title: NFL Trade Rumor: Cowboys, Packers, Browns eye Alvin Kamara
content: Reports suggest New Orleans Saints running back Alvin Kamara and Arizona Cardinals RBs James Conner and Trey Benson need new homes. ESPN’s Mike Clay identified the Washington Commanders, Indianapolis Colts, Dallas Cowboys, Cincinnati Bengals, Green Bay Packers, Kansas City Chiefs, and Cleveland Browns as potential fits. Kamara’s veteran dual-threat ability makes him an interesting option for teams like Dallas Cowboys and Green Bay Packers, despite retirement concerns.

title: Tyson Fury vs Anthony Joshua fight hits hurdle amid Dua Lipa concern
content: Tyson Fury vs Anthony Joshua fight faces fresh uncertainty after Dua Lipa reportedly rejected a Wembley performance proposal linked to the event. Eddie Hearn said the condition did not come from the fighters. The fight, already delayed in the past, is still expected to happen, but concerns remain as preparations continue and Joshua gets ready for his return bout.

title: ‘He’s special, agree or not’: Ashwin’s verdict as Riyan Parag silences critics
content: Riyan Parag silenced critics with a brilliant 90 against Delhi Capitals, a knock that came under immense pressure following a form slump and off-field controversy. His aggressive strokeplay, including a pivotal 6-4-6 sequence, helped Rajasthan Royals recover from an early collapse and post a formidable 225 for 6. Ravichandran Ashwin lauded Parag's performance, stating his bat did all the talking.

title: Saroj Khan embraced Islam for second husband, adopted children condition
content: Indian cinema's legendary choreographer Saroj Khan, renowned for iconic dance numbers, faced immense personal struggles from a young age. Married at 13 to a man who was already wed, she became a mother at 14. Despite early trauma and loss, her passion for dance propelled her to monumental professional success.

title: Why GST collections hit record Rs 2.43L cr in April and will the trend sustain? Explained
content: While the data is at a record high, the biggest factor driving the surge has been the growth in import-led revenues which outpaced domestic transactions. To put it simply, the GST collections from imports were higher than those from domestic transactions.

title: Yashasvi Jaiswal creates first-ball six record but Mitchell Starc has the last laugh
content: Yashasvi Jaiswal etched his name in IPL history by hitting a first-ball six off Mitchell Starc, marking his fourth such instance. This feat placed him atop the list for most first-ball sixes in IPL innings. However, his explosive start was cut short as Starc dismissed him on the third ball, and Rajasthan Royals faced early pressure.

title: Middle East conflict drags on: Is Iran’s economy approaching breaking point?
content: Weeks of conflict have intensified Iran's economic pressures, straining its financial system despite ongoing internal resilience and limited external trade. While facing significant business challenges and rising costs, Iran is leveraging domestic resources and alternative trade routes to sustain itself amidst a Gulf standoff and stalled ceasefire talks.

title: Ex-ACP on SRK’s 2012 Wankhede clash: It was miscommunication
content: Shah Rukh Khan’s explosive 2012 altercation at Mumbai’s Wankhede Stadium—one of the Indian Premier League’s most controversial off-field moments—has resurfaced, with former Assistant Commissioner of Police Iqbal Shaikh now calling it a case of “miscommunication” that spiralled out of control. Recounting the high-voltage night, Shaikh revealed he was on duty when the situation escalated shortly after the match ended, following a minor disagreement between security personnel and the actor’s group.

title: ‘We can go all the way’: Ayush Shetty after India storm into Thomas Cup semis
content: India's Thomas Cup semifinalists are brimming with confidence, aiming to reclaim the title. Youngster Ayush Shetty, unbeaten so far, sealed a crucial quarterfinal win, echoing the team's belief in going all the way. Lakshya Sen's dramatic comeback and the doubles pair's determined victory ignited India's charge, showcasing a squad ready to conquer.

title: Super El-Nino, drought & heat hell: India staring at longest, hottest summer yet
content: India is experiencing extreme heatwaves, with temperatures soaring and heatwaves arriving earlier and with greater intensity. This is exacerbated by the El Niño phenomenon, which is expected to strengthen. The heat poses significant health risks and economic challenges, impacting daily life and livelihoods across the nation. Adaptation and mitigation strategies are crucial for navigating this growing crisis.

title: Anti-climax in Jaipur! Starc vs Sooryavanshi fizzles out as Jamieson steals the show
content: Kyle Jamieson stole the spotlight in the IPL 2026 clash between Delhi Capitals and Rajasthan Royals, dismissing teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi early.  Mitchell Starc also took a wicket on his season debut, but Jamieson's crucial strike prevented the anticipated duel with Sooryavanshi from materialising, giving DC early control.

title: Medal assured! India crush Chinese Taipei 3-0 to storm into Thomas Cup semis
content: India secured a commanding 3-0 victory over Chinese Taipei to storm into the Thomas Cup semifinals, guaranteeing at least a bronze medal. Lakshya Sen ignited the charge with a comeback win, followed by a dominant doubles performance from Satwiksairaj Rankireddy and Chirag Shetty. Ayush Shetty sealed the tie with a composed straight-game victory.

title: R Madhavan’s weight loss secrets: Fasting, diet, early dinner at 55
content: R Madhavan, still a heartthrob at 55, attributes his enduring appeal and fitness to a strict vegetarian diet and a disciplined lifestyle.  He recently shared his weight loss secrets, emphasizing intermittent fasting, mindful eating, early dinners, and prioritizing sleep and hydration.  Fans eagerly await his reunion with Kangana Ranaut.

title: 'All speculation put to rest': Mann's trust motion passes Punjab assembly, takes jab at Cong
content: The Aam Aadmi Party government in Punjab moved a confidence motion in the state assembly following the defection of seven MPs to the BJP. Chief Minister Bhagwant Mann asserted the party's strength and national presence, aiming to dispel rumors of instability. AAP holds a significant majority in the 117-member assembly.

title: Maria Sharapova net worth 2026: $200M fortune from tennis & business
content: Maria Sharapova, a tennis icon, amassed an estimated $180 million net worth primarily through lucrative endorsement deals and her candy brand, Sugarpova. Her remarkable career included winning all four Grand Slams and reaching world No. 1. After retiring in 2020, she continues to thrive in business and investments, maintaining her global recognition.

title: Exclusive: Sargam Ki Sadhe Satii actor Akash Makhija ties the knot with childhood sweetheart Roshni
content: Acclaimed actor Akash Makhija, recognized for his remarkable role in 'Sargam Ki Sadhe Satii', celebrated a heartfelt wedding with his longtime love, Roshni Budhiraja, on April 25, 2026, in the vibrant city of Delhi. Their ceremony, beautifully curated by the Sant Nirankari Mission, radiated an essence of simplicity and unity.

title: ‘Dhurandhar’ singer Vaibhav Gupta praises Aditya Dhar’s music sense
content: Singer Vaibhav has revealed in an interview how composer Shashwat Sachdev discovered him through an Instagram reel and brought him to the attention of director Aditya Dhar for a song in 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge'. Vaibhav Gupta described his meeting at Aditya Dhar's home as a revelation, sharing that the director plays the sitar and offered specific, technically informed guidance on vocal modulation throughout the recording process. Since the film's release on March 19, 2026, music directors across the industry have sent Vaibhav Gupta personal messages saying they "haven't heard a voice like his in a long time." Previously seen on Indian Idol, Vaibhav credits the 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' experience as transformative both professionally and personally.

title: ‘Never dreamt of this’: KL Rahul stunned by Sooryavanshi’s audacious hitting
content: KL Rahul lauded Rajasthan Royals' 15-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, highlighting his phenomenal rise as a testament to T20 cricket's evolution. Sooryavanshi's fearless approach and exceptional batting, including two centuries at a young age, showcase the new generation's aggressive mindset, a trend amplified by the IPL.

title: 'This is election bill': Rahul flays BJP over Rs 993 LPG price jump, warns petrol & diesel next
content: Rahul Gandhi has sharply criticized the Centre over rising inflation, highlighting a significant Rs 993 jump in commercial LPG cylinder prices in a single day. He warned that this surge, amounting to an 81% increase over three months, will heavily impact small businesses and household expenses, predicting further hikes in petrol and diesel prices.

title: ‘He won’t be Bumrah’: Bishop questions Sooryavanshi’s first-ball six chances vs Starc
content: Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has impressed in IPL 2026, scoring 400 runs at a strike rate of 238.10 against top bowlers. He now faces a new challenge against Mitchell Starc, who has recovered from injury and joined Delhi Capitals.  The duel between the fearless youngster and the experienced Australian quick is anticipated to be a key contest.

title: HC rejects plea seeking FIR against Rahul over 'fighting the Indian State' remark
content: The Allahabad high court has dismissed a plea demanding an FIR against Rahul Gandhi for allegedly calling the "Indian State" an opponent. A petitioner claimed Gandhi's remark during an AICC office inauguration in 2025 was seditious and anti-national, hurting public sentiment. Justice Vikram D Chauhan rejected the challenge to a lower court's decision.

title: Piduguralla sizzles at 45.9°C; 64 mandals in A.P. likely to witness heatwave on May 2
content: Light rains accompanied by thunderstorms and lightning are likely at isolated places in Srikakulam, Vizianagaram, ASR, Polavaram, Visakhapatnam, Chittoor and Tirupati districts, says APSDMA

title: Constant churn in Karnataka CMO in this tenure of Siddaramaiah raises eyebrows
content: The present tenure of Siddaramaiah has seen four intelligence chiefs so far and three ACSs. Two of his political secretaries have been sacked

title: Bedroll attendant arrested for ‘raping’ woman on train
content: The accused allegedly raped the woman passenger on board Visakha Express on April 26, says GRP official

title:
Commercial LPG price hike is a blow to 
restaurants, say star hotel owners in A.P.
content: There is no choice but to increase menu prices by up to 10%, says Andhra Pradesh Star Hotels Association State president

title: Amid traffic woes on Mumbai-Pune highway, Maharashtra govt. inaugurates ‘Missing Link’ project
content: As the long-awaited project was thrown open by Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis, the inauguration took some shine away as commuters got stuck for nearly three hours in and around Bhor Ghat stretch of the expressway; the project has found a place in the Guinness Book of World Records

title: Allahabad HC junks plea for sedition case against Rahul Gandhi
content: Court says criticism of government action or policies is not only permitted but is essential in a parliamentary democracy

title: High drama in Punjab Assembly; Congress, Akali Dal allege CM Mann was drunk during House proceedings
content: Congress MLAs staged a walkout and urged the Speaker to initiate action, while the party also called for dope testing of all MLAs and an independent medical check by PGIMER

title: First talks under new Manipur government held with Kuki-Zo insurgent groups
content: A joint statement by the KNO and the UPF said that the day-long discussions focused on operational and security-related issues and “both sides broadly agreed on the need to relocate certain SoO camps to reduce friction with local populations and improve security issues”

title: No scope for wrongdoing at counting centres, Bengal CEO says as security forces maintain strict vigil
content: Stating that round-the-clock CCTV monitoring of strong rooms was in place, Manoj Agarwal termed the allegations baseless

title: After Himanta’s remarks, Indian officials say commitment to normalise ties with Bangladesh unaffected
content: Stakeholders at multiple levels may look at India’s neighbourhood from their point of view; however, that cannot be interpreted as a reflection of Delhi’s current position, The Hindu was told

title: ‘Election bill’, says Rahul Gandhi on commercial LPG price hike; Kharge slams ‘anti-labour’ government
content: Rahul Gandhi says the latest increase is proof that burden of inflation would intensify after polls; K.C. Venugopal says hike will affect ‘crores’; Kharge slams Modi govt. on International Labour Day

title: Jabalpur cruise tragedy death toll rises to 9; survivors allege negligence by crew
content: A cruise boat with 29 passengers and two crew members onboard overturned in the Bargi Dam after encountering a sudden storm

title: Govt. readying technical proposals for talks with Maharashtra on Pranahita-Chevella project
content: Minister for Irrigation Uttam Kumar Reddy says effort is to reduce submergence in Maharashtra for barrage with max height

title: Bridge portion collapses on Jammu outskirts; labourers feared trapped
content: No official confirmation on the exact number of persons trapped under the debris; rescue efforts under way

title: Congress questions ‘silence’ on Ladakh’s demands of statehood, Sixth Schedule status
content: Congress leader Jairam Ramesh said Home Minister Amit Shah appeared to be “basking in the glory of the Piprahwa relics” while sidestepping pressing issues such as statehood

title: Govt. absorbed global oil shock, didn’t pass it on to consumers: Hardeep Puri
content: Petroleum Minister says India has remained resilient even after 60 days of supply disruption and attributed the stability to long-term planning and timely policy interventions by the government

title: Law stands tall above, says Congress as it urges Assam CM to express regret for using inappropriate language
content: Assam CM Himanta Biswa Sarma says he does not need lessons on decency and targets the Congress for maligning his wife who had nothing to do with politics

title: Bookworm slowly picks up pieces after the floods
content: The incident has created a lot of chatter online, and several customers have visited the bookstore and called Mr. Gowda to express solidarity

title: Hemant Soren launches self-enumeration phase of Census 2027 in Jharkhand
content: Census not merely about collecting statistics, but serves as the foundation for policy and welfare schemes, says Mr. Soren; appeals to Jharkhand residents to actively participate in Census process

title: Karnataka launches Statewide respiratory surveillance for traffic police
content: The initiative follows a two-year screening project in Bengaluru, where 3,287 traffic police personnel underwent respiratory and general health assessments that highlighted risk factors

title: Lord Kallazhagar enters the Vaigai amid sea of humanity
content: Lord Kallazhagar, draped in green silk attire and mounted on a golden horse, was carried from the Prasanna Venkatachalapathy  Temple at Tallakulam to Alwarpuram, the venue of the event, around 5.50 a.m.

title: Govt grants relief to firms hit by West Asia disruptions, extends contract deadlines without penalty
content: The relief applies to contracts with government agencies across goods, services and works, an Office Memorandum, issued by the Department of Expenditure, indicated, covering suppliers, consultants and contractors engaged in public procurement

title: Supreme Court to hear Trinamool plea on May 2 against Central staff supervising West Bengal poll counting
content: The TMC challenged the High Court’s reasoning that the presence of a micro-observer (who is also a Central government employee) and CCTV cameras as “sufficient safeguard” against foul play

title: Tamil Nadu to witness hotter May; above normal rainfall could offer relief: IMD
content: In its outlook, the IMD has also outlined the likely impact of increased temperature, including on agriculture, and issued an agromet advisory

title: Watch: TMC, BJP lock horns over EVM tampering claims | Above the Fold | 01.05.2026
content: From a political showdown in West Bengal over EVM allegations to rising LPG prices and the Bargi Dam tragedy, here are the top stories of the day.

title: APSRTC rolls out health checks after rise in staff deaths
content: Nearly 300 employees died in a year; drivers and conductors to undergo medical tests every six months, say officials

title: Nationwide cell broadcast test alert on May 2; people may receive emergency alert on mobile phones
content: During the exercise, citizens may receive an emergency alert notification on their mobile phones, which could be accompanied by a loud sound or vibration

title: TDP cadres prepare to host Mahanadu in Nellore
content: A team, comprising Ministers, MP, MLAs and others, inspects a few sites near IFFCO Kisan SEZ, Podalakur Road and Golagamudi Road junction

title: Noida airport to start commercial flights from June 15 after CEO change over foreign citizenship
content: On March 28, 2026, Prime Minister Narendra Modi formally inaugurated the National Capital Region’s second airport, the Noida International Airport

title: Govt. unveils new municipal rent policy in ULBs in Andhra Pradesh
content: The new rules replace the earlier 33⅓% rent hike once every three years with a 7% annual increase during the lease period

title: Fire Services Dept. gears up to tackle rising summer heat
content: With the number of ‘fire calls’ increasing, 2,386 in April alone, field staff have been advised to stay alert and leave is not being sanctioned unless urgently required, says Fire Services in-charge Director General Venkata Ramana

title: Siddipet court imposes fines worth ₹3.34 lakh on 33 motorists for drunk driving
content: In a separate drive, seven individuals were fined a total of ₹35,000 for driving without valid licences.

title: Harish Rao alleges ₹5,000 cr. scam in HAM roads’ tenders
content: He says the government has handed over work tenders to those who quoted 25% in excess of estimated cost

title: Elephant brought to temple turns violent, kills one, injures mahout
content: An elephant flipped over a car several times, destroying it, and also damaged a few two-wheelers present there, even as an Elephant Squad of the Forest Department tried to capture the jumbo before it moved out from the temple premises to a more populated area, says police

title: Tirupati police roll out four-layer plan to make district ganja-free
content: Ganja testing kits introduced as part of strategy to identify offenders and curb narcotics menace, says SP

title: GBA to launch weekly ‘e-Khata open houses’ across 50 centres in Bengaluru
content: The initiative will begin after May 15. At each centre, around 100 citizens will be invited in advance, with their cases pre-screened and examined by officials prior to the meeting.

title: 'Major milestone': Noida int'l airport to begin flight ops from June 15
content: the TOI Business Desk is a vigilant and dedicated team of journalists committed to delivering the latest and most relevant business news from around the world to readers of the Times of India . the desk ensures that TOI readers are well-informed about the ever-changing and dynamic world of commerce .

title: Petrol, diesel price hike in near future not ruled out, say govt sources
content: Determine the monthly installment amount for a loan Estimate the returns on investments made through SIPs Find out maturity amount and interest earned on PPF Check maturity amount and interest earned on an FD Estimate the pension amount and corpus accumulated under NPS A Mutual Fund Calculator helps estimate the future value of investments

title: Iran calls Trump 'child-killer', demands US pay war reparations
content: At TOI World Desk, our dedicated team of seasoned journalists and passionate writers tirelessly sifts through the vast tapestry of global events to bring you the latest news and diverse perspectives round the clock. With an unwavering commitment to accuracy, depth, and timeliness, we strive to keep you informed about the ever-evolving world, delivering a nuanced understanding of international affairs to our readers. title: Heatwave Sparks Forest Fires Across 12 States, Madhya Pradesh Worst Hit
content: According to the FSI data, at least 10 forest fires were detected burning on Thursday for more than three days continuously.

title: Bypassing Strait Of Hormuz No Easy Task, Experts Warn Gulf Countries
content: Faced with the closure of the Strait of Hormuz, the only maritime entry point to the Gulf, Arab nations are looking for ways to bypass it.

title: Trump Officials Modifying Immigration Crackdown Policy After Backlash
content: ICE arrests have fallen in recent months; the number of people in immigration detention has dropped from roughly 72,000 in January to 58,000 this week

title: Poison, Not Watermelon, May Have Killed 4 Of Mumbai Family, Say Sources
content: Sources said traces of morphine -- a powerful painkiller, usually used to treat severe pain -- were also found in Abdullah's body.

title: Mexico City Sinking Nearly 10 Inches A Year. NASA Spotted It From Space
content: The NASA estimates are based on measurement taken between October 2025 and January 2026 by the NISAR satellite, developed by Indian space agency ISRO.

title: Diamond Harbour "Lyari Of Bengal", Says BJP. Trinamool Hits Back
content: A BJP worker described Diamond Harbour, the Lok Sabha constituency of Trinamool General Secretary Abhishek Banerjee, as the 'Lyari of Bengal'.

title: All 5 On Board Dead After Small Plane Crashes In US
content: The Cessna 421C crashed around 11:25 pm in Wimberley, the Federal Aviation Administration said. It crashed on Thursday night with five people aboard.

title: Israel Sent UAE Laser Weapon Called 'Iron Beam' That Can Vapourise Iranian Drones
content: Tel Aviv sent a version of its Iron Beam laser defence system to the UAE, which vaporises short-range rockets and drones. It was first used by Israel against Hezbollah projectiles from Lebanon.

title: Watch: 2 Bears Enter Srinagar Golf Course, Run Away With Flagstick
content: The bears appear to have successfully circumvented the perimeter during their venture into the course.

title: World's Largest Aircraft Carrier Leaves Persian Gulf As US-Iran Talks Stall
content: The USS Gerald R Ford has been at sea for more than 10 months, and has taken part in US operations against Iran.

title: Iran Delivers New Proposal To Pakistan For US Peace Talks: Report
content: The text of Iran's new proposal, which comes after a failed round of talks with US, was handed to Islamabad on Thursday evening, as per Iranian media.

title: Pentagon Signs Deals With 7 AI Companies, Anthropic Not On List
content: The seven companies with which Pentagon has signed agreements include SpaceX, OpenAI, Google, NVIDIA, Reflection, Microsoft and Amazon Web Services.

title: 6 Of Family Killed As Speeding Car Rams Parked Truck In Hyderabad
content: Hyderabad, May 1 (IANS) Six members of a family were killed when a car in which they were travelling rammed into a parked truck on Outer Ring Road (ORR) on the outskirts of Hyderabad on Friday.

title: Kolkata EVM Strongrooms Fortified After Mamata Banerjee's Visit, Trinamool's Protests
content: The Kolkata Police's move follows high drama last night due to the Trinamool Congress's allegations of suspicious activities at counting centres

title: 'Concerned': Taiwan After China Calls Taipei Biggest Risk In Ties With US
content: In a call with US Secretary of State Marco Rubio Thursday, Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi urged United States to "make the right choices" on Taiwan.
